ItacPersonItem.Notes: He received a degree in medicine and philosophy in 1649. See Gian Luigi Betti, `Giovan Battista Capponi: la “carriera della gloria” di un mago e scienziato nella Bologna del Seicento`, in L`Archiginnasio, (2006).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
